gpuInstallPrompt.title: Enable GPU acceleration?
gpuInstallPrompt.bodyDetected: DatumV detected {gpu} on this machine and can use it to run models much faster.
gpuInstallPrompt.bodySize: Installing GPU support downloads about {size} of NVIDIA runtime libraries to your app-data folder. You can also do this later from Settings → GPU.

gpuRestartPrompt.title: GPU support installed
gpuRestartPrompt.body: The CUDA runtime is ready to use.
gpuRestartPrompt.detail: Restart the backend now to enable GPU acceleration. Your current work will reload after restart.

gpuWrongBuildPrompt.title: This build can't accelerate on your hardware
gpuWrongBuildPrompt.detailNoDriver: You're running the CUDA build of DatumV, but no NVIDIA driver was detected on this machine. CUDA acceleration requires an NVIDIA GPU.
gpuWrongBuildPrompt.detailIncompatibleArch: Your GPU ({gpu}, compute capability {cc}) isn't supported by this build's CUDA toolchain. CUDA 12 + cuDNN 9 require compute capability 7.0 or newer (Volta architecture and up).
gpuWrongBuildPrompt.recommendation: Download the Standard installer instead. It uses DirectML on Windows and Vulkan on Linux for GPU acceleration on a much broader range of hardware — including older NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, and integrated graphics.

title.install: Install {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} to run this query

preflight.pinnedHint: Install this specific version from the model card's previous-versions list.
preflight.unknownPinHint: The catalog has no version matching this pin. Pin to an available version or remove the @… suffix.

licenses.needsAcceptance: {count, plural, one {# license needs acceptance before installing.} other {# licenses need acceptance before installing.}}
licenses.installBlocked: Accept the required licenses to enable Install.

downloading.summary: {count, plural, one {# already downloading} other {# already downloading}}
downloading.allInFlightHint: All required models are already downloading. Cancel and resubmit when they finish.

externalChange.title: File changed on disk
externalChange.message: {name} has been modified outside the editor.
externalChange.detailClean: Reload to pick up the latest version, or keep the editor's current contents.
externalChange.detailDirty: You have unsaved changes in this tab. Reloading will discard them.

deleteFile.title: Delete file
deleteFile.detail: The file will be removed from disk and can't be recovered from the app.
deleteFile.detailDirectory: The folder and all of its contents will be removed from disk and can't be recovered from the app.

export.title: Export query results
export.subtitle: Pick a format and tune its options. You'll choose the file location next.

parquet.title: Parquet
parquet.subtitle: Lossless, round-trips through open_parquet. Best for typed media.

csv.title: CSV
csv.subtitle: Plain text. Opens in Excel; round-trips scalars through open_csv_typed.

json.title: JSON
json.subtitle: Structured. Struct / array / json columns become nested objects, not strings.

arrow.title: Arrow
arrow.subtitle: Columnar IPC. Fastest handoff to pandas / Polars; round-trips through open_arrow.

parquet.compressionHint: Algorithm used to compress each column chunk.
parquet.compressionLevelHint: Only applies to gzip, zstd, and brotli.
parquet.rowGroupSizeHint: Rows per row group. Leave blank for the default (50,000).

csv.headerHint: First line is the comma-separated column names.
csv.delimiterHint: Character separating fields on each line.
csv.lineEndingHint: Newline style at the end of each row.
csv.nullStringHint: Text written for SQL NULL values. Empty means an empty field.

arrow.noOptions: Arrow has no configurable options in this version. The file is written in the Arrow IPC file format (Feather v2); typed-media columns carry datumv.* field metadata that round-trips through open_arrow.

json.shapeHint: Array is friendlier for JSON.parse; JSONL is the streaming-friendly shape ML pipelines expect.
json.indentHint: Inflates the file but makes it easier to inspect by eye.
json.indentDisabled: Not available in JSONL mode — one object per line.

about.title: About DatumV

builtWith.heading: Built with
builtWith.llamaTerms: Use of Llama models is subject to Meta's {licenseLink} and {aupLink}.
builtWith.dependencies: DatumV is built on Llama, LLamaSharp, ONNX Runtime, FFmpeg, Apache Arrow, Electron, and .NET 10.
